_title: ISO 19650-4 — Information exchange between organizations (KEY CONCEPTS ONLY)
_scope_note: v1.6 ships key concepts only per spec §2 'Out of scope' decision. Full exchange-specification detail deferred to per-skill consumption sprints.

key_concepts.information_exchange: Formal transfer of information containers from one organization to another at agreed milestones
key_concepts.exchange_specification: Defined content + structure for a given exchange (typically per EIR)
key_concepts.transmittal: The act + record of an information exchange
key_concepts.audit_trail: Persistent record of who exchanged what with whom and when

common_exchange_milestones: Stage gate review (RIBA Plan of Work stages)
Information container release for coordination (S1 suitability)
Information container release for review (S3 suitability)
Information container release for stage approval (S4 suitability)
Information container release for use (S7 suitability)
_deferred_to_future_sprint: Full content and structure specifications for each exchange type deferred to per-skill consumption sprint (e.g., when a skill consumes the exchange-spec for tender or transmittal output)
